narrative:
Bay Village-04-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 961 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.5 percentage points.
